title: helianthemum salicifolium var. denticulatum
intro: Helianthemum salicifolium var. denticulatum, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, and is valued for its ability to soothe and calm the body. The plant is said to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum salicifolium var. denticulatum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
